howItWorks.intro: This anti-dumping duty calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Dumping Margin
rules.formula: Margin = (Fair Value - Export Price) / Export Price × 100
rules.explanation: Percentage by which export price is below fair market value.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Selling goods in a foreign market below fair value or below home market price.
The duty equals the difference between fair value and the export price.
